welcome_subtitle: Record your body composition and review your history
seasonalTip: Drink plenty of water and maintain a balanced diet for optimal health
name: Name
home_feature_progress_desc: Track weight, body fat and muscle with daily streaks that keep you accountable.
home_feature_ocr_desc: Upload reports, extract metrics automatically and save them to your history.
home_feature_mealplan_desc: Store your PDF plan, view meals by day and mark completions.
home_feature_support_desc: Chat with your nutritionist and get reminders when you need them.
home_steps_subtitle: From your first login to actionable recommendations.
home_step1_desc: Register, add your basic data and health goals.
home_step2_desc: Upload lab PDFs or enter measurements; the OCR does the heavy lifting.
home_step3_desc: Visualize your meal plan, follow tasks and stay on track.
home_highlight_personalized_desc: Nutritionist-driven recommendations tailored to your goals.
home_highlight_secure_desc: Private data stays protected with role-based access.
home_highlight_multichannel_desc: Pick up where you left off across phone and desktop.
